AU_ADVANCEDBSCHEMA.tempString: <entry key = "-1"> <entry key = 'public.EMPLOYEE'><sql name = 'public.EMPLOYEE' key = '' fkey = '' updateKey ='' schemaName ='public' >SELECT "EMP_ID","FIRST_NAME","LAST_NAME","EMAIL","PHONE_NUMBER","HIRE_DATE","JOB_TITLE","SALARY","DEPARTMENT" FROM "EMPLOYEE"</sql> </entry> </entry>
